subtitle: Manage AI provider configurations. Switch in the terminal with <1>ccs use <1><id></1></1>.
notice: Configure by editing the full <1>settings.json</1> (not only <3>env</3><4>, </4><5>permissions</5><6>, </6><7>model</7><8>, etc.). Changes here modify the "template". <9>Already running terminals will not update automatically</9><10>; rerun </10><11>ccs use <1><id></1></11><12> in the corresponding terminal to take effect.</12>
